description: Letter from Mūsā b. Barhūn al-Tāhartī, in Alexandria, to Yosef b. ʿEli Kohen Fāsī, Fustat. Dating: ca. 1053. The sender has been thwarted in his attempt to travel to Palestine due to the weather at sea. He intends to spend the winter in Alexandria. He writes about the flax market in Alexandria. (Information from Gil.)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מאלכסנדריה לפוסטאט. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
